privileged_info_summary: The Legal Process: Basic Problems in the Making and Application of Law is a real published book by Henry M. Hart Jr. and Albert M. Sacks, published by Foundation Press in Westbury, N.Y. in 1994. The book has an ISBN-10 of 1566622360 and ISBN-13 of 9781566622363. The title, authors (Hart and Sacks), publisher, place of publication, and publication year are all verified as correct. However, the expected page count in metadata is incorrect: the task metadata claims 1378 pages, but the actual page count is 1387 pages according to multiple authoritative sources including the Berkeley Law Library catalog and Google Books.
